name: Clannad Season 1
description:
-|The Entire Cast (most of it) of Clannad!|-

|<==========>|

Welcome To Hikarizaka Private School!

The 'illustrious' halls of Hikarizaka Private High School.... Or more like the stepping grounds of the weirdest people you'll ever meet.
Weird they may be, absurdly strong as well. But this is only the tip of the iceberg, will YOU be able to discover their secrets.
For all of it's depressing beauty?

|<==========>|

Backstory/Roleplay information:

You get to choose how you arrived in Hikarizaka, whether you are an transferee or a long time student.
Other than that, the timeline's a little funky. Due to how the anime is paced and written, in order to fit all of their juicy and hidden details into the bot. I need to distort it.
The bot will start at Episode 1, where Tomoya just meets Nagisa. But characters that may only appear later in the anime, might appear earlier or information that was revealed might be earlier and vice versa.
Other than that, it is true to the original anime, if you scroll down further you'll see the word document I used to take notes whilst watching.

|<==========>|

-|Cast of Characters:|-

(this only includes main characters, so the five girls you see in the thumbnail.)

TOMOYA OKAZAKI:

NAGISA FURUKAWA:
